list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.activity FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.vo FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.site FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(m.jobs,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT f.event_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo, s.site_type::text AS site_type, s.description AS site, f.execunitid AS monitoring_point, f.event_start_timestamp, f.event_end_timestamp, ROUND((COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))::numeric,4) AS energy_wh, ROUND(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0),4) AS cfp_g, f.status FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') ORDER BY f.event_start_timestamp DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500;
